title: Edit your order
titleWithRecipient: Improve {name}'s story and edit your order
subtitle: The more details you share, the more exciting the lyrics our songwriters will create.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Update the main details
step1.subtitle: Review name, relationship, genre, and voice.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Answer provocative questions about {name}
step2.titleFallback: Answer provocative questions about the honoree
step2.subtitle: These answers will enrich the final text automatically.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Review and save
step3.subtitle: Check the final fields and save your changes.

email.title: Confirm your email
email.subtitle: Use the same email you used at checkout.
email.label: Email
email.notFound: We couldn't find this order with that email.
email.notEditable: This order is no longer editable.
email.error: We couldn't load your order. Try again.

form.title: Update your story
form.subtitle: The more details you include, the better the lyrics.
form.helper: When you save, we will regenerate the lyrics from scratch.
form.writeTip: Write as much as you want, there's no word limit! The more details, the better the song. Include important dates, special places, memorable moments, achievements, challenges overcome, nicknames... everything that makes this story unique.

guidedQuestions.intro: Hello! 😊 We are preparing the song for {name} with great care. To make the lyrics even more special and personal, we need a few more details:
guidedQuestions.sectionSubtitle: The more details, the more unique {name}'s song will be.

items.title: 🌍 Where does the story begin?
items.description: Where was {name} born and raised? What is their birth date? Is there any childhood or hometown detail that really stands out?

items.title: 💼 The path they built
items.description: What is {name}'s profession or career? Was there any major achievement, struggle, or turning point?

items.title: ✈️ Journeys and adventures
items.description: Was there a trip or adventure you lived together that you will never forget? Where was it, what happened, and why was it so meaningful?

items.title: 💎 The moment that changed everything
items.description: What was the strongest moment between you? The one you would relive if you could. Where did it happen and what did you feel?

items.title: 🗣️ Signature traits
items.description: Does {name} have a loving nickname? Any phrase, habit, or expression they always say?

items.title: 📸 The scene that says it all
items.description: If you could freeze {name} in one image, what would it be? Example: dancing in the kitchen, praying at dawn, fixing everything at home.

items.title: 🏠 Your sacred place
items.description: Is there a place that is sacred to you both? A street, a city, a corner of the house, a beach...

items.title: 💬 What you never said
items.description: What would you like to say to {name} but never had the courage? That word that got stuck in your throat...

guidedQuestions.footer: The more details you share, the more unique and emotional the song will be! 🎵
guidedQuestions.answerHint: Your answers are automatically applied to the final fields below (qualities, memories, and message).
guidedQuestions.answerPlaceholder: Write your answer with as much detail as possible...
guidedQuestions.toneLabel: What tone should the tribute have?
guidedQuestions.toneHint: Choose one or more that match the feeling you want to convey.

form.saved: Saved! We are regenerating the lyrics.
form.error: We couldn't save your changes. Try again.
form.cooldown: Please wait a few minutes before editing again.
form.required: Please fill out all required fields.

savedDialog.title: Changes saved!
savedDialog.subtitle: We are recreating the lyrics for your song.

unsaved.title: You have unsaved changes
unsaved.description: To update your song, click "Save changes" before leaving.
